title: calamintha subnuda
intro: Calamintha subnuda, also known as dwarf calamintha or pygmy calamint, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Calamintha subnuda include reducing stress and anxiety, as well as providing relief from headaches and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to calm the mind and body.
